growth_records.medium: Defined mineral methanol medium (13C-MFA bioreactor medium)

up.method: reported (Table 2: 30.6 C-mmol/gDW/h; methanol has 1 C so C-mmol=mmol); supernatant NMR + off-gas MS

sec.method: reported (Table 2, labeled CO2 by off-gas MS)

growth_records.cite: Delépine et al. Charting the Metabolic Landscape of the Facultative Methylotroph Bacillus methanolicus. mSystems (2020). DOI:10.1128/mSystems.00745-20. [PMC7511216]
growth_records.snippet: Growth rate (h−1) 0.46 ± 0.002; Biomass yield 0.55 ± 0.01 g[dry weight]/g substrate; Substrate uptake rate 30.6 ± 0.6 C-mmol/g[dry weight]/h; CO2 evolution rate 7.6 ± 0.04 mmol/g[dry weight]/h; Acetate production rate ND (Table 2, methanol
growth_records.notes: All values from Table 2 (methanol column, n=2 bioreactor). mu=0.46 h-1 reported (from OD600 exponential phase). doubling_time=ln2/mu=0.693/0.46=1.51 h. Methanol uptake reported as 30.6 C-mmol/gDW/h; methanol=CH3OH=1 carbon, so mmol/gDW/h=C-mmol/gDW/h=30.6. CO2 evolution 7.6 mmol/gDW/h. No acetate detected. ~35% of methanol evaporated directly (noted in text). O2 uptake not measured (only pO2>25% controlled). Yxs=0.55 g/g.

growth_records.medium: Defined mineral medium with mannitol (same base as methanol medium, 15 mM mannitol, no yeast extract in main culture)

up.method: calculated from Table 2 (36 C-mmol/gDW/h ÷ 6 C per mannitol = 6.0 mmol/gDW/h)

growth_records.cite: Delépine et al. Charting the Metabolic Landscape of the Facultative Methylotroph Bacillus methanolicus. mSystems (2020). DOI:10.1128/mSystems.00745-20. [PMC7511216]
growth_records.snippet: Growth rate 0.36 ± 0.02 h−1; Biomass yield 0.34 ± 0.08; Substrate uptake rate 36 ± 7.3 C-mmol/g[dry weight]/h; Acetate production rate 1.75 ± 0.32 mmol/g[dry weight]/h (Table 2, mannitol). 'acetate was produced at up to 2 mmol/g(dry cell we
growth_records.notes: Table 2 mannitol column (n=3 flask). mu=0.36 h-1 reported. doubling_time=ln2/0.36=1.93 h. Substrate uptake 36 C-mmol/gDW/h; mannitol=C6, so mmol uptake=36/6=6.0 mmol/gDW/h. Acetate secretion 1.75 mmol/gDW/h reported (text: up to 2 mmol/gDW/h, yield 0.3 mol/mol). CO2 not measured (NA) in flask. Yxs=0.34 g/g.

growth_records.medium: Defined mineral medium with arabitol (same base as methanol medium, 15 mM arabitol, no yeast extract in main culture)

up.method: calculated from Table 2 [1/2-13C] arabitol (21.4 C-mmol/gDW/h ÷ 5 C = 4.28 mmol/gDW/h); parallel [5-13C] experiment gave 24.5 C-mmol/gDW/h ÷5 = 4.9 mmol/gDW/h

sec.method: reported: no metabolite accumulated above NMR detection limit (~100 µM); acetate ND

growth_records.cite: Delépine et al. Charting the Metabolic Landscape of the Facultative Methylotroph Bacillus methanolicus. mSystems (2020). DOI:10.1128/mSystems.00745-20. [PMC7511216]
growth_records.snippet: Arabitol [1-13C]&[2-13C]: Growth rate 0.15 ± 0.004 h−1, Biomass yield 0.19 ± 0.02, Substrate uptake 21.4 ± 1.2 C-mmol/g[dw]/h; [5-13C]: 0.14 ± 0.02 h−1, 0.23 ± 0.02, 24.5 ± 0.75 C-mmol/g[dw]/h (Table 2).
growth_records.notes: Table 2 arabitol columns (n=3 flask each of two parallel-labeling tracer experiments of the SAME growth condition). Primary values from [1/2-13C]: mu=0.15 h-1, Yxs=0.19 g/g, uptake 21.4 C-mmol/gDW/h; arabitol=C5 so mmol uptake=21.4/5=4.28 mmol/gDW/h (text rounds to 4.3). Parallel [5-13C] experiment: mu=0.14 h-1, Yxs=0.23, uptake 24.5 C-mmol/gDW/h => 4.9 mmol/gDW/h. doubling_time=ln2/0.15=4.62 h. No secretion detected (NMR limit ~100 µM); acetate ND.
